bead.title: refactor(svelte): add WebSocket disconnected banner hooked to graphql-ws client
bead.description:
Opus Stage 4 batch review (2026-04-15): graphql-ws default retry is fine, but the UI shows stale data silently if a subscription has terminally dropped. Add a tiny 'disconnected' banner hooked off getSubscriptionClient() state so users know when live updates are off.

Scope: small top-of-NavShell indicator (yellow dot + 'reconnecting…') that clears when the client state returns to connected.
bead.acceptance: (1) Disconnecting the server shows the banner within ~1s. (2) Reconnecting clears the banner. (3) Playwright spec covers the banner state.
